title: (No AI) China’s Moonshot AI raises $2B at $20B valuation as demand for open-source AI skyrockets

title: (No AI) Musk’s biggest loyalist became his biggest liability
author: Elizabeth Lopatto
content:
![Graphic collage of Shivon Zilis.](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/05/STPK222_SHIVON_ZILIS2.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

I sat down in the _Musk v. Altman_ trial courtroom today, painfully aware that no one was going to ask Shivon Zilis the question on everyone's minds: Girl, what the _fuck_ are you _doing_?

Zilis, who testified under oath that she is the mother of four of Musk's children, was… what's the best way to characterize this? A Musk adviser? She denies she was a "chief of staff" but says she worked for Musk's "entire AI portfolio: Tesla, Neuralink, and OpenAI" starting in 2017. The two met through OpenAI, and they had what she referred to as a "one off" before becoming "friends and colleagues." The "one off," she confirmed, was "romantic in nature."

Her …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/925665/musk-altman-trial-shivon-zilis-testimony)

title: (No AI) Google shuts down Project Mariner
author: Emma Roth
content:
![The Project Mariner logo](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/05/project-mariner-logo.png?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

Google has pulled the plug on Project Mariner, an experimental feature designed to perform tasks for you across the web, as [reported earlier by _Wired_'s Maxwell Zeff](https://x.com/ZeffMax/status/2051824497242833234?s=20). The [Project Mariner landing page](https://labs.google.com/mariner/landing) now contains a message that says: "Thank you for using Project Mariner. It was shut down on May 4th, 2026 and its technology voyaged to other Google products."

Google [first revealed Project Mariner](https://www.theverge.com/2024/12/11/24317436/google-deepmind-project-astra-mariner-ai-agent) in December 2024 and later announced an update allowing it to [perform up to 10 tasks at a time.](https://www.theverge.com/google/671200/google-googling-ai-mode-project-mariner-i-o-2025) Over the past year, Google has integrated features powered by Project Mariner into its other AI tools, including [Gemini Agent](https://www.theverge.com/news/670848/google-agent-mode-gemini-app-project-mariner-i-o-2025), which can do things like arc …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/tech/925559/google-project-mariner-shut-down)

creator: Andy Greenberg
title: (No AI) Thousands of Vibe-Coded Apps Expose Corporate and Personal Data on the Open Web
dc:creator: Andy Greenberg
content: Companies like Lovable, Base44, Replit, and Netlify use AI to let anyone build a web app in seconds—and in thousands of cases, spill highly sensitive data onto the public internet.
contentSnippet: Companies like Lovable, Base44, Replit, and Netlify use AI to let anyone build a web app in seconds—and in thousands of cases, spill highly sensitive data onto the public internet.

creator: Kate Knibbs
title: (No AI) This Reggae Band Is in a Nightmare Battle Against AI Slop Remixes
dc:creator: Kate Knibbs
content: When Stick Figure’s seven-year-old song shot up the charts, the band was thrilled. But its viral moment was spurred by unauthorized AI remixes.
contentSnippet: When Stick Figure’s seven-year-old song shot up the charts, the band was thrilled. But its viral moment was spurred by unauthorized AI remixes.
